title: エイシンフラッシュ登場！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Eishin Flash presents me a full three-year
timetable for her racing career before the Twinkle
Series even gets underway.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's not only aiming for the Classic Triple
Crown, but also the title of Twin Tenno Sho
Champion... With such airtight plans, we must
work hard to make them a reality.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Though she intends to return to Germany upon
completing her goals, she seems completely
committed to racing in the meantime.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My three years with the straightlaced,
no-nonsense Eishin Flash has begun. By adhering
to her perfect schedule, she's aiming to become a
version of herself she can be proud of.
